name: AgriWebb Livestock Farm Management API
what_it_does: Livestock farm management platform with REST API — enabling beef, sheep, and mixed livestock producers to record animal movements, weights, treatments, mob management, paddock data, and farm tasks, with ESG traceability reporting, supply chain integration, and data sharing with processors and retailers for sustainability compliance.
use_cases: Retrieving livestock mob and animal data via AgriWebb API for traceability reporting
Recording animal movements and treatments via AgriWebb API for farm management automation
Accessing paddock and property data via AgriWebb API for pasture management integration
Integrating AgriWebb with processing plant systems via API for supply chain traceability
Querying AgriWebb farm performance metrics via API for sustainability and ESG reporting
not_for: Cropping and arable farming (AgriWebb is livestock-specific — use other platforms for crops)
Small hobby farms without commercial livestock operations
Non-livestock agricultural data (use Granular or FarmLogs for crop farming)
best_when: A commercial beef, sheep, or mixed livestock producer needs a digital farm management tool — with API access for supply chain integration, processor connectivity, and ESG traceability compliance.
avoid_when: You're managing crops, have small hobby livestock operations, or don't need supply chain integration.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for API access. Bearer token auth. Scoped access per data type (mobs, animals, paddocks, treatments). Webhook for farm event notifications. Partnership API requires application approval. Mobile app (iOS/Android) primary for farmers. API for third-party integrations and supply chain partners. Data sharing consent model — farmers control data sharing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; farm subscription + integration partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Farm subscription per property; Integration API via partnership agreement
pricing.notes: Australian company (Sydney). Founded 2014 by Justin Webb, Ben Tottenham, and Don Rowe. Raised $34M Series B (2020, Five V Capital, GS Futures). Used by 14,000+ farms in Australia, UK, USA, Ireland. Livestock-focused: cattle, sheep, goats. Red Meat Advisory Council certified. NLIS (National Livestock Identification System) Australia integration. Integration with meat processors (JBS, Teys, NH Foods). ESG and carbon footprint reporting built-in. LEAF (Linking Environment and Farming) in UK. Traceability from paddock to plate. Growing in US beef industry.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with OAuth2. Partnership application required. Webhook for events. GDPR compliant. Livestock-specific domain knowledge required. Australian company. Annual contract. Mobile-first platform — API for integration partners, not self-service.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Animal reads idempotent by animal ID. Mob reads idempotent. Paddock reads idempotent. Event recording not idempotent — check for duplicates. Treatment records idempotent by record ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Partnership API requires application and approval — not self-service
Livestock domain expertise required (mob management, NLIS tagging concepts)
Data sharing requires farmer consent — farmers control their data sharing permissions
Annual subscription for farms + partnership agreement for API access
Australian NLIS integration adds complexity for Australian livestock traceability

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. OAuth2 with scoped access. Farmer data ownership — farmers control data sharing. Australian Privacy Act compliance (local jurisdiction). Data sharing consent model. Partnership approval process reduces unauthorized API access risk. Farm data sensitivity (business-critical operational data).
